end,{},function(O,G)local x=r(G)local X=function(X,d,N)return g(O,{X,d,N},G,x)end return X end,function(O,G)local x=r(G)local X=function(X,d,N,z,a,C,w)return g(O,{X,d;N;z,a;C;w},G,x)end return X end,function(O,G)local x=r(G)local X=function(X,d)return g(O,{X;d},G,x)end return X end,function(O)local G,g=822005-822004,O[-684828-(-684829)]while g do w[g],G=w[g]-(-696608-(-696609)),(206923+-206922)+G if w[g]==-265000+265000 then w[g],C[g]=nil,nil end g=O[G]end end,function(O,G)local x=r(G)local X=function()return g(O,{},G,x)end return X end return(I(-177033+15049219,{}))(x(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[G(1038462+-986754)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
